chapter_title.ar: باب الْأَوْقَاتِ الَّتِي يُكْرَهُ فِيهَا الذَّبْحُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – The timings during which the slaughter is abhorred

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/20)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/20)
text: كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَأْمُرُ غِلْمَانَهُ أَنْ لَا يَذْبَحُوا حَتَّى يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ . فِي نَوَادِرِ الْجُمُعَةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Amro, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from Aban Bin Taghlub,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> used to order his<sup>asws</sup> servants that they should not slaughter until the emergence of the dawn’. – In a miscellaneous (Hadeeth) regarding the day of Friday.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn Ali from Muhammad ibn ‘Amr from Jamil ibn Darraj from Aban ibn Taghlib who has said the following: Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Ali ibn al-Husayn, would command his servants not to slaughter any animal before dawn on Friday. This Hadith is of rare Ahadith about Fridays.’”
